textByHash.06dd3c5b88cfb69d6ed61d6ebbafaea078b43ec0: You're her! The one who murdered the General's pet. Leave this place at once!
textByHash.26877359ffeabcd8e5545e11389ccf3188c8977a: You're them! The one who murdered the General's pet. Leave this place at once!
textByHash.4e00b69e980f980cb379ec81374f2a12fb3626f1: Are you new? I've never seen you around here before.
textByHash.5ee62069a206107873703d11fe3476aa8b45c641: Of course not! You have to be one of us, and you're clearly not. Now get out of here.
textByHash.8103bb14ad2f246e268f031c42ead719b4d32f1f: You're him! The one who murdered the General's pet. Leave this place at once!
textByHash.b11d34a1e63fe98322cb0ed42959d6e372a2191e: Yeah, well spotted. You have to be one of us to go in there, and you're clearly not. Now get out of here.
textByHash.c0448136175a121d1d37453ed15cb63a90c55a41: So you're back for more are you? General Khazard will be pleased.
